title: Unexpected size difference reproduction (Objects)
summary: Resolve "unexpected size difference" — reproduction for the Objects surface.

content.text:
## Symptom

An operation against the Objects surface fails with an error matching "unexpected size difference (reproduction)".

## Resolution

1. Inspect the error envelope.
2. Re-issue with corrected parameters.
3. Confirm via the audit log.

See the [Objects API reference](/docs/api/buckets/get) for the exact field set.
